subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents were understood. Thou hadst complained of loneliness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و مضمون مفهوم گردید شکایت از تنهاای نموده بودی
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
